description: After 1m-1M-1NT, bid the other minor as an artificial checkback to find major-suit fits or determine strength
purpose: After opener rebids 1NT, responder may need to explore for an 8-card major fit or determine whether to invite or bid game. NMF provides a one-round forcing mechanism to extract more information from opener.

teaching.tradeoff: After 1m-1M-1NT, the bid of the other minor loses its natural meaning in exchange for an artificial forcing checkback bid.
teaching.principle: After a 1NT rebid by opener, responder may still need to explore for an 8-card major fit or determine whether to invite or bid game. NMF provides a one-round forcing mechanism to extract more information.
commonMistakes: NMF is the OTHER minor — if opener opened 1C, NMF is 2D; if opener opened 1D, NMF is 2C
You need 10+ HCP to use NMF — with a weak hand, either sign off in 2M or pass 1NT
After NMF, opener's first priority is showing 3-card support for responder's major, not rebidding NT

explanationEntries.displayText: Responder has invitational+ values (10+ HCP)
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough for NMF — need 10+ HCP

explanationEntries.displayText: Responder has game values (12+ HCP)
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough for game — need 12+ HCP

explanationEntries.displayText: Opener has 3+ hearts
Opener has 3+ spades
Opener has minimum values (12-13 HCP)
Opener has maximum values (14 HCP)
Open 1♣
Open 1♦
Open 1♥
Open 1♠
Respond 1♥ showing 4+ hearts
Respond 1♠ showing 4+ spades
Opener rebids 1♠ with 4+ spades after 1♥ response
Opener rebids 1NT showing 12-14 HCP balanced
New Minor Forcing 2♦ — artificial checkback after 1♣ opening
New Minor Forcing 2♣ — artificial checkback after 1♦ opening
Sign off in 2♥ with 5+ hearts and a weak hand
Sign off in 2♠ with 5+ spades and a weak hand
2NT invite — 10-11 HCP balanced, no major fit preference
3NT game — 12+ HCP with no major fit
Pass 1NT with a weak hand and no 5-card major
Show 3+ card heart support after NMF
Show 4+ spades (no heart support) after NMF
2NT minimum (12-13 HCP) — no major fit after NMF
3NT maximum (14 HCP) — no major fit after NMF
Show 3+ card spade support after NMF
Show 4+ hearts (no spade support) after NMF
2NT minimum (12-13 HCP) — no major fit after NMF
3NT maximum (14 HCP) — no major fit after NMF

teachingLabel.name: Partner opens 1H
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1H first with a 5-card heart suit that is longer than spades

clauses.description: Spades are at least as long as hearts

teachingLabel.name: Partner opens 1S
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1S first with a 5-card spade suit or equal 5-5 majors

clauses.description: Clubs are longer, or the minors are equal 3-3

teachingLabel.name: Partner opens 1C
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1C with no 5-card major when clubs are longer, or with equal 3-3 minors

clauses.description: Diamonds are at least as long as clubs

teachingLabel.name: Partner opens 1D
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1D with no 5-card major when diamonds are at least as long as clubs

teachingLabel.name: Respond 1H
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ hearts with 6+ HCP

teachingLabel.name: Respond 1S
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ spades with 6+ HCP

teachingLabel.name: Opener rebids 1S
teachingLabel.summary: With 4+ spades, show the other major before rebidding notrump

teachingLabel.name: Opener rebids 1NT
teachingLabel.summary: 12-14 HCP balanced, denies 4-card support for responder's major

teachingLabel.name: Opener rebids 1NT
teachingLabel.summary: 12-14 HCP balanced, denies a 4-card heart suit to show naturally

teachingLabel.name: New Minor Forcing 2D
teachingLabel.summary: Artificial checkback — asks opener to further describe their hand

teachingLabel.name: New Minor Forcing 2C
teachingLabel.summary: Artificial checkback — asks opener to further describe their hand

teachingLabel.name: Sign off in 2H
teachingLabel.summary: Weak hand with 5+ hearts — sign off at the 2-level

teachingLabel.name: Sign off in 2S
teachingLabel.summary: Weak hand with 5+ spades — sign off at the 2-level

teachingLabel.name: 2NT invite
teachingLabel.summary: Invitational 10-11 HCP balanced — no major fit preference

teachingLabel.name: 3NT game
teachingLabel.summary: Game values with no major fit — place the contract in 3NT

teachingLabel.name: Pass
teachingLabel.summary: Weak hand (6-9 HCP) with no 5-card major — play in 1NT

teachingLabel.name: Show heart support
teachingLabel.summary: Show 3+ card support for responder's hearts

teachingLabel.name: Show 4 spades
teachingLabel.summary: No heart support but 4+ spades — show the other major

teachingLabel.name: 2NT minimum
teachingLabel.summary: No major fit, minimum hand (12-13 HCP)

teachingLabel.name: 3NT maximum
teachingLabel.summary: No major fit, maximum hand (14 HCP)

teachingLabel.name: Show spade support
teachingLabel.summary: Show 3+ card support for responder's spades

teachingLabel.name: Show 4 hearts
teachingLabel.summary: No spade support but 4+ hearts — show the other major

teachingLabel.name: 2NT minimum
teachingLabel.summary: No major fit, minimum hand (12-13 HCP)

teachingLabel.name: 3NT maximum
teachingLabel.summary: No major fit, maximum hand (14 HCP)

definitions.description: Spades are at least as long as hearts
Clubs are longer than diamonds, or the minors are equal at 3-3
Diamonds are at least as long as clubs
